Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.predicate

Class ReverseResolutionResolver

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.predicate.ReverseResolutionResolver
All Implemented Interfaces:
IResolver
public class ReverseResolutionResolver extends Object implements IResolver
This class is responsible for applying the unit resolution rule between a clause and a set of unit clauses. It is instantiated with a UnitMatchIterable and initialized with a non-unit clause. Each call to next() then returns a match between the non-unit clause and the unit clauses in the UnitMatchIterable.
